description: Style Note Welcome the summer with the utmost style in this funky T-shirt from fila. Perfect for casual days out, you can wear this T-shirt for everyday dressing with jeans, cargos or chinos depending on your mood. Crafted in fine quality cotton and designed with a regular Fit, this one is soft and comfy. Product Details Navy blue round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and print on the chest Material and Care 100% cotton Wash in warm water Do not tumble dry or bleach Use warm iron Dry clean if necessary   Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M   Style NoteWelcome the summer with the utmost style in this funky T-shirt from Fila.
